license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pufdntn
title: Preparation of the sgRNA-Barcode Amplicon Library
author: Shiqi Xie

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare the following mixture: %s %s Use 1000ng genomic DNA or 100ng plasmid DNA for the PCR
PCR cycles 98°C 30sec 98°C 10sec | 53°C 30sec | 22 or 12 cycles 72°C 3min | 72°C 5min 22 cycles for gDNA, 12 cycles for plasmids
Gel extract the PCR product: Run the PCR products on 1% agarose gel. Include vector control in another lane. Excise 3kb fragment and perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2 x 10 µL of EB.
Incubate at 37˚C for 30 min. Undetermined, 30 min
Perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2x10ul. Spec the DNA concentration by Qubit.
Incubate at 25°C for 2 hours. Undetermined, 2 hours
Perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2x10 µl EB.
Incubate at 37C for 30 min. Undetermined, 30 min
Perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2x10ul. Spec the DNA concentration by using Qubit.
Perform PCR by using the following program: 95°C 3min 98°C 20sec | 60°C 15sec | 16 cycles 72°C 1min | 72°C 3min
Run samples on 1% agarose gel. Excise band at 400bp
Run the samples on Tapestation (D1000 tape) to check the final size of the library.
